ingredients.item:
SALAD
7 ounces (200 g) store-bought or homemade seitan, cut into thin slices
½ teaspoon five-spice powder
ingredients.original:
SALAD
7 ounces (200 g) store-bought or homemade seitan, cut into thin slices
½ teaspoon five-spice powder

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon minced lemongrass
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon minced lemongrass

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon sugar
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon sugar

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon vegetable oil
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon vegetable oil

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon soy sauce
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon soy sauce

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon vegetarian oyster sauce
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon vegetarian oyster sauce

ingredients.item: 10 ounces (283 g) dried rice vermicelli noodles or 21 ounces (600 g) fresh rice vermicelli noodles
ingredients.original: 10 ounces (283 g) dried rice vermicelli noodles or 21 ounces (600 g) fresh rice vermicelli noodles

ingredients.item: 7 ounces (200 g) leaf or iceberg lettuce, shredded or torn
ingredients.original: 7 ounces (200 g) leaf or iceberg lettuce, shredded or torn

ingredients.item: 3 ounces (90 g) herbs (such as mint, perilla, cilantro, and/or Asian basil leaves), chopped
ingredients.original: 3 ounces (90 g) herbs (such as mint, perilla, cilantro, and/or Asian basil leaves), chopped

ingredients.item: 8 rolls tofu wrapped in wild betel leaf (optional)
ingredients.original: 8 rolls tofu wrapped in wild betel leaf (optional)

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons annatto oil, for drizzling
ingredients.original: 2 tablespoons annatto oil, for drizzling

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons crushed roasted peanuts, for garnish
ingredients.original: 3 tablespoons crushed roasted peanuts, for garnish

ingredients.item: ½ cup (120 ml) water
ingredients.original: ½ cup (120 ml) water

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons sugar
ingredients.original: 2 tablespoons sugar

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons vegetable oil
ingredients.original: 3 tablespoons vegetable oil

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons thinly sliced leek (white part only)
ingredients.original: 3 tablespoons thinly sliced leek (white part only)

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon peanut butter
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon peanut butter

ingredients.item: 1. MAKE THE SALAD In a medium bowl, combine seitan, five-spice powder, lemongrass, 1 teaspoon of sugar, stock powder, pepper, 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil, soy sauce, and vegetarian oyster sauce. Mix well and let sit for 15 minutes.
ingredients.original: 1. MAKE THE SALAD In a medium bowl, combine seitan, five-spice powder, lemongrass, 1 teaspoon of sugar, stock powder, pepper, 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil, soy sauce, and vegetarian oyster sauce. Mix well and let sit for 15 minutes.

ingredients.item: 2. Spread out the seitan slices on a sheet pan lined with parchment paper. Grill in the oven under the broiler or in an air fryer at 350°F (175°C) until slightly golden brown (10 to 15 minutes in the oven or 10 minutes in the air fryer).
ingredients.original: 2. Spread out the seitan slices on a sheet pan lined with parchment paper. Grill in the oven under the broiler or in an air fryer at 350°F (175°C) until slightly golden brown (10 to 15 minutes in the oven or 10 minutes in the air fryer).

ingredients.item: 3. MAKE THE SAUCE In a food processor, combine the chao cubes, fermented soybean sauce, water, and 2 tablespoons of sugar, and process until smooth. Set aside.
ingredients.original: 3. MAKE THE SAUCE In a food processor, combine the chao cubes, fermented soybean sauce, water, and 2 tablespoons of sugar, and process until smooth. Set aside.

ingredients.item: 4. In a medium skillet, heat 3 tablespoons of vegetable oil over medium-low heat. When hot, add leek and cook and stir until golden brown (about 2 minutes). Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a small bowl.
ingredients.original: 4. In a medium skillet, heat 3 tablespoons of vegetable oil over medium-low heat. When hot, add leek and cook and stir until golden brown (about 2 minutes). Using a slotted spoon, transfer to a small bowl.

ingredients.item: 5. Add the blended sauce and peanut butter to the remaining oil in the skillet and stir well. Bring to a boil, and then reduce the heat to low and simmer until slightly thickened (about 2 minutes).
ingredients.original: 5. Add the blended sauce and peanut butter to the remaining oil in the skillet and stir well. Bring to a boil, and then reduce the heat to low and simmer until slightly thickened (about 2 minutes).

ingredients.item: 6. If using dried vermicelli noodles, cook them following the instructions on the package.
ingredients.original: 6. If using dried vermicelli noodles, cook them following the instructions on the package.

ingredients.item: 7. Fill serving bowls about one-third with lettuce and herbs, and then layer about one-third of the cooked rice vermicelli noodles on top. Place a few pieces of grilled seitan and a couple rolls of tofu wrapped in wild betel leaf (if using). Drizzle the sauce and annatto oil over the top, sprinkle with roasted peanuts and fried leek, toss, and serve.
ingredients.original: 7. Fill serving bowls about one-third with lettuce and herbs, and then layer about one-third of the cooked rice vermicelli noodles on top. Place a few pieces of grilled seitan and a couple rolls of tofu wrapped in wild betel leaf (if using). Drizzle the sauce and annatto oil over the top, sprinkle with roasted peanuts and fried leek, toss, and serve.
